title: How The Anchor Filled Empty Tables
challenge: Quiet sessions and empty tables that barely covered staff costs
action: AI-planned events and offers, a clear reason to book, and a booking journey that turned interest into confirmed tables
result: Table bookings grew 403%, with quiet sessions now consistently busy

title: How The Anchor Grew Food Revenue by 98%
challenge: Flat food sales, an underpowered menu, and pricing with no strategy behind it
action: Menu engineering with AI, sensory descriptions, strategic pricing, and a high-margin hero product
result: Food revenue grew 98% in three months, with higher-margin dishes leading sales

title: How The Anchor Grew Google Search Visibility by 828%
challenge: Barely showing up when locals searched, and a website that just sat there
action: A search-led, AI-optimised website built around what locals actually search for, plus consistent local visibility
result: Google Search visibility grew 828%, turning searches into real bookings
